name: Sin City Deciples Motorcycle Club
description: The Sin City Deciples Motorcycle Club is a mixed-race one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in Gary, Indiana in 1967. It is one of the oldest and most well-known black outlaw motorcycle clubs in the United States, with chapters across the U.S. and international presence. The club is involved in illicit drug sales and is regarded as a criminal organization by law enforcement.

sources.title: Sin City Deciples Motorcycle Club — Wikipedia
